codeReview.summary: The automation engine schema was fully implemented with all 4 required tables (automation, automation_trigger, automation_action, automation_execution_log), proper enums, relations, indexes, and migration file. All expected behavior from the feature requirements was implemented correctly.

summary: The feature m4-1-automation-schema successfully creates the automation engine schema with 4 tables supporting multiple trigger types (event, schedule, condition) and action types (whatsapp, email, update_record, create_task). The implementation includes proper foreign key relationships, indexes for efficient querying, enums for type safety, JSONB columns for flexible configuration storage, and a migration SQL file. The schema validation passed and all exports are correctly defined in index.ts and relations.ts.
